scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @nextserve/web" "npm run start:dev -w @nextserve/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nextserve/api && npm run build -w @nextserve/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @nextserve/api && npm run lint -w @nextserve/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @nextserve/api && npm run typecheck -w @nextserve/web
